title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Agility India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Agility India
jsonLd.description:
Agility India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Chennai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Agility India:
Agility India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Agility India!
